requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire-Safety and Local Installation Review
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全与当地安装审查
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全與當地安裝審查

summary.en: Turkish BESS projects may need local fire-authority, building, occupational-safety, insurer, and project-owner review in addition to product-level CE or TSE evidence. The Turkish building fire-protection framework governs fire precautions for buildings, while BESS-specific expectations are often handled through site design, fire detection and suppression design, ventilation or gas management, emergency shutdown, separation distances, and commissioning documentation rather than a single confirmed whole-unit national BESS fire certificate.
summary.zh: 土耳其BESS项目除产品级CE或TSE证据外，可能还需要接受地方消防主管机关、建筑、职业安全、保险方及项目业主审查。土耳其建筑消防保护框架管理建筑物消防措施，而BESS特定要求通常通过现场设计、火灾探测和灭火设计、通风或气体管理、紧急停机、间距及调试文件处理，而非一个已确认的整机国家级BESS消防证书。
summary.zht: 土耳其BESS項目除產品級CE或TSE證據外，可能還需要接受地方消防主管機關、建築、職業安全、保險方及項目業主審查。土耳其建築消防保護框架管理建築物消防措施，而BESS特定要求通常透過現場設計、火災探測和滅火設計、通風或氣體管理、緊急停機、間距及調試文件處理，而非一個已確認的整機國家級BESS消防證書。

standards_or_laws: Binalarin Yangindan Korunmasi Hakkinda Yonetmelik (Turkey building fire-protection regulation)
Local fire-authority, municipality, insurer, and project-owner fire-safety review

summary.en: China commonly relies on GB 44240-2024, GB/T 36276-2023, GB/T 36558, and project fire-design review for stationary energy storage. These documents can support a Turkish fire-safety file but do not replace Turkish local fire-authority or site-approval expectations.
summary.zh: 中国通常依据GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及项目消防设计审查管理固定式储能。这些文件可支持土耳其消防安全资料包，但不能替代土耳其地方消防主管机关或现场批准要求。
summary.zht: 中國通常依據GB 44240-2024、GB/T 36276-2023、GB/T 36558及項目消防設計審查管理固定式儲能。這些文件可支持土耳其消防安全資料包，但不能替代土耳其地方消防主管機關或現場批准要求。

gap.en: Prepare a site-specific fire dossier: enclosure layout, cell chemistry, thermal-runaway mitigation, fire detection and suppression concept, ventilation or gas hazard analysis, spacing, access routes, emergency shutdown, water-runoff or contamination controls where relevant, commissioning tests, and Turkish emergency procedures.
gap.zh: 应准备场站特定消防资料包：柜体布置、电芯化学体系、热失控缓解、火灾探测与灭火方案、通风或气体危险分析、间距、通道、紧急停机、适用时的消防水外排或污染控制、调试测试及土耳其语应急程序。
gap.zht: 應準備場站特定消防資料包：櫃體佈置、電芯化學體系、熱失控緩解、火災探測與滅火方案、通風或氣體危險分析、間距、通道、緊急停機、適用時的消防水外排或污染控制、調試測試及土耳其語應急程序。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Turkish building, municipality, occupational-safety, insurer, or local fire-authority review applies; no confirmed blanket national whole-unit BESS fire certificate is stated here
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, local fire review, and procurement requirements

source.publisher: Republic of Turkey Mevzuat Bilgi Sistemi

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Product safety evidence alone is not enough for Turkish BESS fire review. Treat fire design and local installation acceptance as project-specific approval items.
compliance_verdict.zh: [INFORMATIONAL] 产品安全证据本身不足以覆盖土耳其BESS消防审查。应将消防设计和当地安装验收作为项目特定批准事项处理。
compliance_verdict.zht: [INFORMATIONAL] 產品安全證據本身不足以覆蓋土耳其BESS消防審查。應將消防設計和當地安裝驗收作為項目特定批准事項處理。
